results.title: India's predicted 11 for 1st T20I vs Ireland: Shreyas Iyer to lead, Tilak Varma vice-captain, Will Vaibhav Sooryavanshi play at Belfast?
results.description: The two match T20I series between India and Ireland kicks off on Friday, June 26, at Belfast. The inaugural fixture is set to commence at 6:00 PM IST.

results.title: Four Minutes to Kickoff: X-VPN's Soccer 2026 Dedicated Servers Are Built to Just Work
results.description: A purpose-built lineup across six regions puts match-day streaming a couple of taps away - no scrolling through a list of eighty countries to find the right one.

results.title: Soft conditions challenge golfers in Spirit of America opener
results.description: Despite the near-perfect weather Wednesday, a rain-softened Burningtree Country Club challenged golfers during the opening round of the Spirit of America Golf Tournament.

results.title: South Africa Stun South Korea to Make World Cup History
results.description: South Africa beat South Korea 1-0 on Wednesday to reach the World Cup knockout rounds for the first time in their history -- an astonishing turnaround after a dismal opening defeat. The Bafana Bafana, playing in a World Cup for the first time since they hosted it in 2010, were widely written off after their 2-0 loss to Group A winners Mexico in the tournament's curtainraiser, said AFP.
